_meta.generated_by: nd-department-enrich workflow (46 web-research agents, nd.edu sourced)
_meta.note: department_context blurbs + project_dept inferences; every entry carries a source URL and confidence. Conservative: only confidence>=medium project depts kept.

ACE.blurb: A University of Notre Dame initiative that sustains and strengthens under-resourced Catholic K-12 schools by forming teachers and leaders.

Architecture.official_name: University of Notre Dame School of Architecture
Architecture.blurb: A free-standing professional school at Notre Dame offering degrees in architecture with a focus on classical and traditional design and urbanism.

Arts and Letters.blurb: Notre Dame's oldest and largest college, offering humanities, arts, and social science programs across about 19 departments.

CSE.official_name: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
CSE.blurb: The University of Notre Dame's department offering degrees in computer science and computer engineering within the College of Engineering.

Data Science.official_name: Master of Science in Data Science
Data Science.blurb: Notre Dame's online M.S. in Data Science program, taught by faculty across multiple departments, completed in 21 months.

Engineering.blurb: Notre Dame's engineering school, established in 1897, with five departments spanning aerospace/mechanical, chemical, civil, computer, and electrical engineering.

Global Health.college: Notre Dame Research (university-wide institute; M.S. degree administered via the College of Science)
Global Health.blurb: A university-wide Notre Dame institute, founded in 2010, that conducts research, education, and service addressing global health disparities.

Institute for Educational Initiatives (I.blurb: A University of Notre Dame institute supporting K-12 education research, teaching, and service, with attention to Catholic schools.

Law School.blurb: The University of Notre Dame's law school, established in 1869, granting Juris Doctor and other law degrees.

Lucy.official_name: Lucy Family Institute for Data and Society
Lucy.blurb: A university-wide Notre Dame research institute advancing data science and AI convergence research, solutions, and education.

MSAN.official_name: Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA)
MSAN.blurb: A one-year STEM-designated graduate degree at Mendoza teaching statistics, machine learning, and data analytics for business decisions.

Math.blurb: The Department of Mathematics offers undergraduate and graduate degrees and conducts research in pure and applied mathematics.

Math and Engineering.official_name: Mathematics and Engineering Science Program (Department of Mathematics)
Math and Engineering.blurb: An undergraduate concentration in Notre Dame's Department of Mathematics for students interested in applied or industrial mathematics.

Mendoza.blurb: The University of Notre Dame's business school, offering undergraduate, MBA, specialized master's, and PhD programs.

Music.blurb: The University of Notre Dame's academic department for the study, scholarship, and performance of music.

ND Learning.blurb: University unit advancing teaching and learning, housing the Kaneb Center for Teaching Excellence and the Office of Digital Learning.

NEON.college: Notre Dame Learning / Office of Digital Learning (ODL)
NEON.blurb: An external network Notre Dame's Office of Digital Learning partners with to deliver online credit-bearing courses to Title I high school students.

Philosophy.blurb: An academic department in Notre Dame's College of Arts and Letters offering undergraduate and graduate study in philosophy.

ResLife.blurb: Notre Dame office that manages and supports the university's undergraduate residence hall communities and on-campus housing.

Science.blurb: A college at the University of Notre Dame comprising departments in mathematics, statistics, chemistry, biology, physics, and preprofessional studies.

Theology.blurb: The academic department at Notre Dame offering theology degrees and teaching core-curriculum theology courses.

Writing Faculty.blurb: Notre Dame program offering writing courses, tutoring, and a Writing Center to help students develop writing skills.
